entry.title: 神经网络反向传播算法推导
entry.content:
神经网络的反向传播算法

一、前置知识

1.Logistic回归算法

目标：将给定的数据进行分类

输入：$ \pmb{x}\in \mathbb{R}^n $，输出：$ y\in {0,1} $

模型：$ P(\pmb{x}) = sigmoid(w^Tx+b), w\in \mathbb{R}^n, x\in \mathbb{R}^n, b\in \mathbb{R} $

模型的训练:通过极大化对数似然函数：

$$
\begin{aligned}
-L(\pmb{w}) = \frac 1 m \sum_{i = 1}^m y^ilog(P(\pmb{x}^i)) + (1-y^i)log(1-P(\pmb{x}^i))
\end{aligned}
$$

即最小化：

$$
\begin{aligned}
L(\pmb{w}) = -\frac 1 m \sum_{i = 1}^m y^ilog(P(\pmb{x}^i)) + (1-y^i)log(1-P(\pmb{x}^i))
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
\frac{\partial}{\partial \pmb{w}}L(\pmb{w}) = \frac 1 m \sum_{i = 1}^m(P(\pmb{x^i}) - y^i)\pmb{x^i}
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
\frac{\partial}{\partial b}L(\pmb{w}) = \frac 1 m \sum_{i = 1}^mP(\pmb{x^i})-y^i
\end{aligned}
$$

更新参数：

$$
\begin{aligned}
\pmb{w} = \pmb{w} - \alpha \frac{\partial}{\partial \pmb{w}}L(\pmb{w})
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
b = b - \alpha \frac{\partial}{\partial b}L(\pmb{w})
\end{aligned}
$$

2.神经网络的前向传播

输入层为$ X\in \mathbb{R}^{m\times 5} $, 第一层权重矩阵$ W^1\in \mathbb{R}^{3\times 5} $, 第二层权重矩阵$ W^2\in \mathbb{R}^{1\times 3} $
前向传播：$ \pmb{z^1} = \pmb{X(W^1)^T} , \pmb{a^1} = sigmoid(\pmb{z^1}), \pmb{z^2} = \pmb{a^1(W^2)^T}, \pmb{a^2} = sigmoid(\pmb{z^2}) $
注：忽略偏置单元

二、反向传播算法

1.标量形式推导

$$
\begin{aligned}
L = -\frac 1 m \sum_{k = 1}^m y_klog(a^2_k) + (1-y_k)log(1-a^2_k))
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned} \
\frac{\partial L}{\partial W^2_{ij}} &= \frac{\partial L}{\partial z^2_i} \frac{\partial z^2_i}{\partial W^2_{ij}} \
&= \frac{\partial L}{\partial a^2_i}\frac{\partial a^2_i}{\partial z^2_i}\frac{\partial z^2_i}{\partial W^2_{ij}} \
&= -(\frac{y_i}{a^2_i}+\frac{1-y_i}{1-a^2_i})a^2_i(1 - a^2_i)a^1_j \
&= (a^2_i-y_i)a^1_j \ \
\frac{\partial L}{\partial W^1_{ij}} &= …
\end{aligned}
$$

2.矩阵形式推导

链式求导法

$$
\begin{aligned}
L &= \sum_{i,j}-\pmb{Y_{ij}}\log \pmb{A^2_{ij}} - \sum_{i,j}(1-\pmb{Y_{ij}})\log (1-\pmb{A^2_{ij}})\ \
\frac{\partial L}{\partial \pmb{Z^2_{ij}}} &= -\pmb{Y_{ij}}(1-\pmb{A^2_{ij}}) - (1-\pmb{Y_{ij}})\frac{1}{1-\pmb{A^2_{ij}}}\pmb{A_{ij}}(1-\pmb{A^2_{ij}})\
\frac{\partial L}{\partial \pmb{Z^2}} &= -\pmb{Y}\odot (1-\pmb{A^2}) - (1-\pmb{Y})\odot \pmb{A^2}\
&= \pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y}\
\frac{\partial L}{\partial \pmb{W_2}} &=\frac{\partial L}{\partial \pmb{Z^2}}\frac{\partial \pmb{Z^2}}{\partial \pmb{W^2}}\
&=(\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})
\end{aligned}
$$

微分法

相关运算性质：

$$
\begin{aligned}
&tr(A^T(B\odot C)) = tr((A\odot B)^TC) = \sum_{i,j}A_{ij}B_{ij}C_{ij}\
&d\sigma (Z) = \sigma (Z)\odot (1-\sigma (Z))dZ\
&d(AB)=(dA)B + AdB\
&d(c_1A+c_2B) = c_1dA+c_2dB\
&dA^T = (dA)^T\
&tr(A^TB) = \sum_{i,j}A_{ij}B_{ij}
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
\pmb{L} &= -\pmb{Y}\odot \log \pmb{A^2} - (1 - \pmb{Y})\odot \log (1 - \pmb{A^2}) \
L &= tr(-\pmb{Y^T}\log \pmb{A^2}) - tr((1-\pmb{Y})^T\log (\pmb{1-A^2})) \ \
dL &= tr(d(-\pmb{Y^T}\log \pmb{A^2})) - tr(d((1 - \pmb{Y})^T\log (1 - \pmb{A^2}))) \
&= tr(-d(\pmb{Y^T})\log \pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y^T}d\log \pmb{A^2}) - tr(d((1 - \pmb{Y})^T)\log (1-\pmb{A^2})+(1-\pmb{Y})^Td\log (1-\pmb{A^2}))\
&= tr(-\pmb{Y^T}(\frac{1}{\pmb{A^2}}\odot d\pmb{A^2})) + tr((1-\pmb{Y})^T\frac{1}{1-\pmb{A^2}}\odot d\pmb{A^2})\
&=tr((1-\pmb{Y})^T\frac{1}{1-\pmb{A^2}}\odot d\pmb{A^2}) -tr(\pmb{Y^T}(\frac{1}{\pmb{A^2}}\odot d\pmb{A^2}))\
&=tr(((1-\pmb{Y})\odot \frac{1}{1-\pmb{A^2}})^Td\pmb{A^2}) - tr((\pmb{Y}\odot \frac{1}{\pmb{A^2}})^Td\pmb{A^2})\
&=tr(((1-\pmb{Y})\odot \frac{1}{1-\pmb{A^2}}\odot \pmb{A^2}\odot(1 - \pmb{A^2}))^T d\pmb{Z^2}) - tr((\pmb{Y}\odot \frac{1}{\pmb{A^2}}\odot \pmb{A^2}\odot(1 - \pmb{A^2}))^Td\pmb{Z^2})\
&=tr(((1-\pmb{Y})\odot \pmb{A^2})^Td\pmb{Z^2}) - tr((\pmb{Y}\odot (1-\pmb{A^2}))^Td\pmb{Z^2})\
&=tr((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^Td\pmb{Z^2})\ \
&\frac{\partial L}{\partial \pmb{Z^2}} = \pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y}\ \
\end{aligned}
$$

$$
\begin{aligned}
dL &= tr((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T(d\pmb{A^1})\pmb{(W^2)}^T) + tr((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1}d\pmb{(W^2)}^T)\
&=tr(\pmb{(W^2)}^T(\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^Td\pmb{A^1}) + tr(((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1})^Td\pmb{W^2})\
&=tr((\pmb{W^2})^T(\pmb{A^2}-\pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1}\odot (1-\pmb{A^1})\odot d\pmb{Z^1}) + tr(((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1})^Td\pmb{W^2})\
&=tr(((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})\pmb{W^2})^T\pmb{A^1}\odot (1-\pmb{A^1})\odot d\pmb{Z^1}) + tr(((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1})^Td\pmb{W^2})\
&=tr(((\pmb{A^2}-\pmb{Y})\pmb{W^2}\odot \pmb{A^1}\odot (1-\pmb{A^1}))^Td\pmb{Z^1}) + tr(((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1})^Td\pmb{W^2})\
&=tr(((\pmb{A^2}-\pmb{Y})\pmb{W^2}\odot \pmb{A^1}\odot (1-\pmb{A^1}))^T((d\pmb{X})\pmb{W^1}^T+\pmb{X}d(\pmb{W^1})^T) + tr(((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1})^Td\pmb{W^2})\
&=tr(((\pmb{A^2}-\pmb{Y})\pmb{W^2}\odot \pmb{A^1}\odot (1-\pmb{A^1}))^T\pmb{X}d(\pmb{W^1})^T)+tr(((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1})^Td\pmb{W^2})\
&=tr((((\pmb{A^2}-\pmb{Y})\pmb{W^2}\odot \pmb{A^1}\odot (1-\pmb{A^1}))^T\pmb{X})^Td\pmb{W^1}) +tr(((\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1})^Td\pmb{W^2})\ \
&\frac{\partial L}{\partial \pmb{W^2}} = (\pmb{A^2} - \pmb{Y})^T\pmb{A^1}\
&\frac{\partial L}{\partial \pmb{W^1}} = ((\pmb{A^2}-\pmb{Y})\pmb{W^2}\odot \pmb{A^1}\odot (1-\pmb{A^1}))^T\pmb{X}
\end{aligned}
$$

entry.title: 理解 diffusion model
entry.content: 挖个坑，讲讲自己对 diffusion 模型的理解
